name: DevOps Mastery
description: Competency framework for DevOps Engineer 2026 — AWS, Terraform, Kubernetes, Golang, DevSecOps, Platform Engineering. Sourced from the 12-month DevOps roadmap & 2 Google Sheets (gid=1970847068 skills, gid=1890838692 levels).

levels.label: Intern · Foundational
levels.description: Hiểu khái niệm cốt lõi, đã đọc tài liệu, có thể giải thích cho người mới. Tương đương Intern / Fresher mới ra trường.
levels.examples: Đọc tài liệu hiểu được; trả lời câu hỏi cơ bản; làm theo guide step-by-step có giám sát.

levels.label: Junior · Working
levels.description: Làm được task dưới sự hỗ trợ. Theo tutorial hoàn thành được. Tương đương Junior 1–2 năm kinh nghiệm.
levels.examples: Build 1 project end-to-end theo guide; debug lỗi thông thường; biết khi nào hỏi senior.

levels.label: Mid · Strong
levels.description: Làm độc lập trên production. Debug được issue trung bình một mình. Tương đương Mid / Senior 3–5 năm kinh nghiệm.
levels.examples: Design + ship 1 service production; review code đồng nghiệp; on-call được; mentor junior.

levels.label: Senior Tech Lead · Expert
levels.description: Thiết kế hệ thống lớn, mentor team, đóng góp upstream open source, set technical direction. Tương đương Senior 6+ / Tech Lead / Staff.
levels.examples: Lead 1 platform initiative; speak ở meetup/conference; contribute meaningful PR vào CNCF/HashiCorp; viết ADR/RFC.

careerStages.name: Intern
careerStages.description: Học hỏi cơ bản, có người hướng dẫn

careerStages.name: Fresher
careerStages.description: Mới ra trường, làm task có giám sát

careerStages.name: Junior
careerStages.description: 1–2 năm, làm task độc lập với hỗ trợ

careerStages.name: Mid
careerStages.description: 3–4 năm, ship feature production một mình

categories.name: AWS
categories.description: Core AWS services for production-grade workloads.

skills.name: IAM Deep (trust, conditions, boundaries)
skills.description: IAM policies, roles, SCPs, Permission Boundaries — production-grade access control.

skills.name: VPC Networking (subnets, NAT, endpoints)
skills.description: 3-tier VPC design, route tables, NAT vs VPC Endpoints, Security Groups.

skills.name: ECS Fargate
skills.description: Task definitions, services, ALB integration, capacity providers.

skills.name: RDS PostgreSQL
skills.description: Multi-AZ, backups, parameter groups, IAM auth, performance tuning.

skills.name: S3 + CloudFront + OAC
skills.description: Static hosting, OAC, cache policies, signed URLs.

categories.name: Terraform / IaC
categories.description: Infrastructure as Code with Terraform / OpenTofu.

categories.name: Kubernetes & EKS
categories.description: Container orchestration with Kubernetes & AWS EKS.

categories.name: Golang for DevOps
categories.description: Go for CLI tools, REST/gRPC services, operators, custom providers.

skills.name: CLI tools (cobra, viper, AWS SDK v2)

categories.name: CI/CD & GitOps
categories.description: Continuous Integration, Continuous Deployment, GitOps with Argo CD.

categories.name: DevSecOps
categories.description: Supply chain security, policy as code, runtime detection.

categories.name: Soft Skills
categories.description: Communication, writing, leadership for senior DevOps.

tracks.title: Foundational Track
tracks.description: Build your DevOps base — AWS, Terraform fundamentals, Go basics.

weeks.title: Setup, AWS Foundations, IAM Deep Dive
weeks.summary: Tuần 1 — môi trường dev, AWS account hygiene, IAM cơ bản đến nâng cao.
goals: Thiết lập AWS Org + 3 accounts + Budget Alarm
Hiểu IAM evaluation logic (deny > allow > implicit deny)
Phân biệt SCP / Permission Boundary / IAM Policy / Session Policy

modules.title: AWS Account Hygiene
modules.summary: Setup AWS Organizations, Identity Center, MFA, Budget Alarm — không dùng root, không tạo IAM User.

lessons.title: IAM Identity Center & MFA
lessons.introMd: **IAM Identity Center** (trước đây là AWS SSO) là cách quản lý user tập trung của AWS 2026. Trong lesson này bạn sẽ học vì sao **không bao giờ** nên tạo IAM Users cho dev, và cách dùng SSO + permission sets.

exercises.promptMd: Đâu là cách quản lý dev access AWS **khuyến nghị 2026**?

options.text: Tạo IAM User + Access Key cho mỗi dev
IAM Identity Center + SSO + temporary credentials
Tạo 1 IAM User chung cho cả team

exercises.explanationMd: IAM Identity Center cấp credentials **tạm thời** (1-12h) qua SSO, không có long-lived access key bị rò rỉ. Đây là chuẩn 2026.

exercises.promptMd: Thứ tự đánh giá IAM policy nào ĐÚNG? (chọn tất cả áp dụng)
exercises.explanationMd: Quy tắc: **explicit deny > explicit allow > implicit deny**. SCP/Permission Boundary đều có thể chặn (intersection of all permissions).

exercises.promptMd: Hoàn thành câu: 'Khi user assume role, credentials trả về có thời hạn tối đa ___ giờ (mặc định 1, tối đa cấu hình được lên 12).'

payload.template: Credentials assume role có thời hạn tối đa ___ giờ.

exercises.explanationMd: STS `AssumeRole` có max session duration 12 giờ (configurable trên role).

lessons.title: IAM Policy Evaluation Logic
lessons.introMd: Hiểu cách AWS đánh giá quyền: SCP → Permission Boundary → IAM Policy → Session Policy. Tất cả 4 lớp phải đồng ý → request được allow.

exercises.promptMd: Sắp xếp 4 layer permission AWS đánh giá theo thứ tự (top-down, từ org đến session):
exercises.explanationMd: Tất cả 4 layer phải đồng ý → action được allow. 1 explicit deny ở bất kỳ layer = deny.

exercises.promptMd: Lệnh AWS CLI nào in ra danh tính hiện tại (account, user/role, ARN)?
exercises.explanationMd: `aws sts get-caller-identity` là lệnh debug đầu tiên khi cấu hình credentials.

exercises.promptMd: Vấn đề bảo mật của IAM policy sau là gì?

options.text: Over-privileged: cho phép mọi action trên mọi resource

exercises.explanationMd: Policy `Action: *` + `Resource: *` = admin god mode. Vi phạm least-privilege. Cần liệt kê action cụ thể + resource cụ thể.

weeks.title: Terraform Foundation + State + Provider
weeks.summary: HCL2 syntax, providers, remote state với S3 + DynamoDB lock, state surgery.

modules.title: HCL2 & Provider Setup
modules.summary: Cú pháp HCL2, providers, version pinning, plugin cache.

lessons.title: HCL2 Syntax & Provider Block
lessons.introMd: **HCL2** là ngôn ngữ cấu hình của Terraform. Bạn sẽ học block, expressions, interpolation, và cách khai báo provider với version pinning.

exercises.promptMd: Đâu là block khai báo provider AWS đúng cú pháp 2026?
exercises.explanationMd: HCL2 dùng block: `provider "aws" { region = "..." }`. Tên provider trong dấu nháy, body dùng `=`.

exercises.promptMd: Để pin version provider AWS ~> 5.0, điền vào: `required_providers { aws = { source = ___ , version = ___ } }`
exercises.explanationMd: Source là namespace registry (`hashicorp/aws`), version dùng pessimistic constraint `~> 5.0` cho phép 5.x nhưng không lên 6.

lessons.title: Remote State với S3 + DynamoDB Lock
lessons.introMd: **Remote state** lưu file `terraform.tfstate` trên S3 (versioned, encrypted) + DynamoDB table để **lock** tránh concurrent apply gây corruption.

exercises.promptMd: Tại sao DynamoDB cần thiết cho state lock, dù S3 đã có versioning?

options.text: S3 không hỗ trợ versioning với .tfstate
DynamoDB conditional write cho phép atomic lock — S3 không có lock primitive

exercises.explanationMd: DynamoDB dùng `ConditionExpression` để atomic acquire lock; S3 không có lock primitive. Versioning S3 chỉ là backup, không ngăn 2 người apply cùng lúc.

exercises.promptMd: Sắp xếp các bước bootstrap Terraform remote backend đúng thứ tự:

steps.text: Tạo S3 bucket + DynamoDB table bằng AWS CLI hoặc Terraform local
Bật versioning + encryption cho S3 bucket
Khai báo backend "s3" trong terraform block
Chạy `terraform init` — TF migrate state local lên S3

exercises.explanationMd: Bootstrap chicken-and-egg: tạo bucket/table trước, mới khai báo backend, mới init.

exercises.promptMd: Lệnh terraform để xem state hiện tại có resources nào?
exercises.explanationMd: `terraform state list` liệt kê tất cả resource trong state. Dùng `state show <addr>` để xem chi tiết.

weeks.title: VPC Networking + Terraform Modules
weeks.summary: 3-tier VPC, subnets, NAT vs VPC endpoints, security groups, Terraform module pattern.
goals: Hiểu NAT vs VPC Endpoints cost

modules.title: AWS VPC Architecture
modules.summary: Public/private/isolated subnets, route tables, NAT, IGW, endpoints.

lessons.title: VPC 3-Tier Architecture
lessons.introMd: VPC production chuẩn: 3 AZs × (public + private + db) = 9 subnets. Public ra IGW, private qua NAT, db không có route ra ngoài.

exercises.promptMd: Tại sao private subnet KHÔNG cần route 0.0.0.0/0 đến IGW?

options.text: Private subnet route 0.0.0.0/0 qua NAT Gateway để outbound an toàn, IGW chỉ dùng cho public subnet

exercises.explanationMd: Private subnet vẫn cần outbound (vd để pull image, gọi API). Route qua NAT Gateway (1-way: out yes, in no) là pattern bảo mật.

exercises.promptMd: VPC Endpoint S3 (gateway type) miễn phí. VPC Endpoint ECR (interface type) tốn $7/tháng. Tại sao S3 free?

options.text: S3 endpoint là route table entry, không tốn hourly compute

exercises.explanationMd: Gateway endpoint (S3, DynamoDB) là entry trong route table — không có ENI, không hourly. Interface endpoint dùng ENI + AWS PrivateLink → tính phí.

lessons.title: Terraform Module Pattern
lessons.introMd: Module = đơn vị tái sử dụng. Có inputs (variables), outputs, và body. Versioning qua git tag SemVer (`v1.2.0`).

exercises.promptMd: Module source sau có vấn đề gì cho production?

options.text: Thiếu version constraint → upstream breaking change có thể vỡ infra

exercises.explanationMd: Production luôn pin version: `version = "~> 5.0"`. Không pin = roulette với upstream release.
Type `number` (không quote), default integer literal. Validation block check business rule.

weeks.title: Compute (EC2, ALB) + for_each / count / dynamic
weeks.summary: EC2 instance types, Auto Scaling Group, Application Load Balancer, Terraform meta-arguments.
goals: Hiểu khi nào dùng count vs for_each

lessons.title: ALB vs NLB — Khi nào dùng cái nào
lessons.introMd: **ALB** layer 7 (HTTP): path/host routing, WAF, OAuth. **NLB** layer 4 (TCP/UDP): static IP, ultra low latency, millions RPS. Chọn ALB cho HTTP app, NLB cho non-HTTP hoặc cần static IP.

exercises.promptMd: API service public HTTP cần path-based routing (/api/v1 vs /api/v2). Chọn LB nào?
exercises.explanationMd: ALB layer 7 hỗ trợ path-based routing. NLB không hiểu HTTP path.

lessons.title: count vs for_each
lessons.introMd: **count** dùng cho N resources giống hệt (index-based). **for_each** dùng khi cần unique key + heterogeneous config. for_each an toàn hơn khi reorder.

exercises.promptMd: Bạn có list `var.users = ["alice", "bob", "carol"]` để tạo IAM users. Sau đó remove "bob" → kết quả gì với count vs for_each?

options.text: count: alice và carol bị recreate (index thay đổi). for_each: chỉ bob bị xoá.
count: bob bị xoá an toàn

exercises.explanationMd: count dùng index nên reorder list → diff massive. for_each dùng key (cần `toset()` cho list) → ổn định.

exercises.promptMd: Để convert list sang set cho for_each: `for_each = ___(var.users)`
exercises.explanationMd: `toset()` convert list → set, mỗi value làm key trong for_each.

weeks.title: Go Foundations + AWS SDK v2 (CLI Tool #1)
weeks.summary: Go syntax, error handling, goroutines, build first CLI tool dùng AWS SDK v2.

lessons.title: Go Error Handling Idiom
lessons.introMd: Go không có exception. Mọi function trả về `(result, error)`. Idiom: `if err != nil { return err }`. Wrap errors với `fmt.Errorf("...: %w", err)`.

exercises.promptMd: Để wrap 1 error trong Go 1.13+ giữ stack info, dùng:
exercises.explanationMd: `%w` verb wrap error, có thể unwrap với `errors.Is` / `errors.As`. `%s` chỉ string-format, mất chain.

lessons.title: AWS SDK Go v2 Basics
lessons.introMd: SDK v2 dùng `config.LoadDefaultConfig(ctx)` để chain credentials (env → shared file → IRSA). Gọi service: `ec2.NewFromConfig(cfg).DescribeInstances(...)`.

exercises.promptMd: Lệnh AWS CLI tương đương `aws sts get-caller-identity` để in account ID + ARN:
exercises.explanationMd: `sts:GetCallerIdentity` không cần permission, dùng để debug danh tính.

exercises.promptMd: AWS SDK Go v2 dùng pattern nào để config options?
exercises.explanationMd: v2 functional options khác hẳn v1. Dễ extend, immutable.

weeks.title: RDS + Secrets Manager + Cross-Stack Data
weeks.summary: Multi-AZ RDS Postgres, Secrets Manager rotation, cross-stack sharing via SSM Parameter Store.

lessons.title: RDS Multi-AZ vs Read Replicas
lessons.introMd: **Multi-AZ**: HA (synchronous replica AZ khác, auto-failover < 1 min). **Read Replica**: scale read (async, có lag). Khác mục đích — đừng confuse.

exercises.promptMd: App OLTP cần RPO < 1 phút và RTO < 5 phút khi AZ fail. Chọn:
exercises.explanationMd: Multi-AZ là HA với failover ~30s-1m. Read Replica là async, không phải HA.

exercises.promptMd: Để tự rotate password RDS qua Secrets Manager mỗi 30 ngày: bật `RotationRules { AutomaticallyAfterDays = ___ }` và attach Lambda template ___
exercises.explanationMd: Secrets Manager có Lambda templates sẵn cho RDS. Single user pattern đơn giản; alternating user an toàn hơn cho zero-downtime.

weeks.title: ECS Fargate + ECR + GitHub Actions OIDC
weeks.summary: Dockerize Go service, push ECR, deploy ECS Fargate qua GitHub Actions OIDC (no static keys).

lessons.title: Task Role vs Execution Role
lessons.introMd: Hai role hay confuse: **Execution Role** dùng cho ECS agent (pull image, push log). **Task Role** dùng cho code app trong container (gọi S3/DynamoDB...).

exercises.promptMd: App Go trong ECS Fargate cần đọc S3 bucket. IAM role nào cần `s3:GetObject` permission?
exercises.explanationMd: **Task Role** = quyền của code app. Execution Role chỉ cần ECR pull + CloudWatch logs.

lessons.title: GitHub OIDC ↔ AWS — Tại sao bỏ Access Key
lessons.introMd: GH OIDC: action JWT → AWS STS AssumeRole → temporary credentials. Không cần long-lived `AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY` trong GH secrets. Trust policy validate `sub` claim (repo + branch).

exercises.promptMd: Trust policy sau có vấn đề gì?

options.text: Condition quá rộng — `repo:*` cho phép BẤT KỲ repo trong tổ chức assume role

exercises.explanationMd: Phải pin: `repo:OWNER/REPO:ref:refs/heads/main`. Pattern `repo:*` = ai cũng assume được.

weeks.title: S3 + CloudFront + Route 53 + ACM
weeks.summary: Static site hosting với S3 private + CloudFront + OAC + HTTPS qua ACM us-east-1.
goals: S3 private + OAC pattern (không dùng OAI legacy)

lessons.title: Tại sao ACM cho CloudFront phải ở us-east-1?
lessons.introMd: CloudFront là **global** service nhưng AWS quản lý cert qua us-east-1 ACM. Edge locations pull cert từ region đó. Region khác → CF không thấy được.

exercises.promptMd: Bạn ở ap-southeast-1. Tạo ACM cert ở SG attach vào CloudFront — kết quả?

options.text: CloudFront không thấy cert, phải tạo lại ở us-east-1

exercises.explanationMd: ACM cho CloudFront BẮT BUỘC ở us-east-1. ACM cho ALB/NLB thì cùng region với LB.

lessons.title: OAC (Origin Access Control) vs OAI Legacy
lessons.introMd: **OAC** (2022+) thay thế OAI: SigV4 native, hỗ trợ SSE-KMS, dynamic content. AWS khuyến nghị dùng OAC, không OAI mới.

exercises.promptMd: Bucket policy mẫu OAC đúng cho CloudFront pull S3 object:

options.text: Principal: Service cloudfront.amazonaws.com + Condition StringEquals AWS:SourceArn = CF distribution ARN

exercises.explanationMd: OAC dùng service principal `cloudfront.amazonaws.com` + condition `aws:SourceArn` = distribution arn. Tránh confused deputy.

weeks.title: Observability (CloudWatch + OTel) + Cost Report Tool
weeks.summary: CloudWatch metrics/logs/alarms, X-Ray, OpenTelemetry SDK Go, viết shopctl cost-report CLI.

lessons.title: USE vs RED Method
lessons.introMd: **USE** (Util/Saturation/Errors) cho resource (CPU, disk). **RED** (Rate/Errors/Duration) cho service (API endpoint). Hai mặt của cùng 1 vấn đề.

exercises.promptMd: Bạn monitor 1 HTTP API. Dùng method nào?

options.text: RED — request rate, error rate, latency p99
Cả 2 — USE cho infra, RED cho service

exercises.explanationMd: RED cho API endpoint (rate/errors/duration). USE cho resource bên dưới. Production cần cả 2.

lessons.title: CloudWatch Log Group Retention Trap
lessons.introMd: Default CloudWatch log retention = **Never Expire**. Logs tích luỹ → bill bill bill. Luôn set retention rõ ràng khi tạo log group.

exercises.promptMd: Property Terraform `aws_cloudwatch_log_group` để set retention 30 ngày:
exercises.explanationMd: `retention_in_days = 30`. Có sẵn các giá trị 1, 3, 5, 7, 14, 30, 60, 90, ...

weeks.title: Terraform Advanced — Modules pro + Terratest + Drift
weeks.summary: Module design patterns, Terratest tests Go, tflint, checkov pre-commit, drift detection.

lessons.title: Plan-only test vs Terratest apply
lessons.introMd: **Validate/Plan tests** (fmt, validate, plan, tflint, checkov): nhanh, không tốn cloud. **Terratest**: apply thật → assert outputs → destroy. Tốn $ + thời gian.

exercises.promptMd: Khi nào đủ với plan-only test, không cần Terratest?

options.text: Khi module chỉ là composition (gọi resource đơn giản, không có logic conditional)
Khi module có dynamic block phức tạp

exercises.explanationMd: Module đơn giản: plan đủ phát hiện lỗi. Module phức tạp (dynamic, for_each, output dependency) → Terratest apply thật để verify behaviour.

lessons.title: Drift Detection Strategy
lessons.introMd: **Drift** = state ≠ real cloud. Nguyên nhân: ConsoleOps, multi-actor. Detect bằng `terraform plan` schedule cron — nếu diff không expected → alert.

exercises.promptMd: Drift detection nightly best practice nào?

options.text: GitHub Actions cron 2am: terraform plan → if non-empty diff, post to Slack
Tự apply auto khi có drift

exercises.explanationMd: Plan rồi alert (a), không auto-apply (nguy hiểm). Disable console là phòng ngừa tốt nhất (c).

weeks.title: Multi-Environment + Secrets Hygiene
weeks.summary: Dev/Stg/Prod separation, PR → dev → stg → prod promotion, gitleaks pre-commit.

lessons.title: Folder-per-env vs Terraform workspaces
lessons.introMd: **Workspaces** legacy: 1 backend, nhiều state. Risky cho prod (1 mistake = wrong env). **Folder-per-env**: separate backend per env, separate role, separate review. Recommended cho production.

exercises.promptMd: Tại sao `terraform workspace` KHÔNG khuyến nghị cho prod separation?

options.text: Cùng backend, cùng IAM role — 1 typo (`terraform workspace select prod`) có thể apply lên prod nhầm

exercises.explanationMd: Workspace tốt cho ephemeral dev/feature branches. Prod cần backend riêng + role riêng = folder pattern.

weeks.title: Cert Crunch + Capstone (SAA-C03 + TF Associate)
weeks.summary: AWS SAA-C03 prep, HashiCorp TF Associate (003), capstone polish, blog post + Loom demo.

lessons.title: SAA-C03 Key Domains
lessons.introMd: SAA-C03 4 domains: Secure Architectures (30%), Resilient Architectures (26%), High-Performing Architectures (24%), Cost-Optimized Architectures (20%). Tập trung security weight cao nhất.

exercises.promptMd: Domain nào có weight cao nhất trong SAA-C03?
exercises.explanationMd: Secure = 30%. AWS 2026 nhấn mạnh security baseline.

lessons.title: Phase 1 Retrospective
lessons.introMd: Cuối Q1 viết retro: 5 thứ đã học, 3 sai lầm, 3 focus tiếp theo. Đăng public blog post → cement học + signal cho recruiter.

exercises.promptMd: Lý do quan trọng nhất để viết blog post mỗi tháng trong roadmap 12 tháng?

options.text: Forced writing = forced understanding (Feynman); signal cho recruiter; build personal brand

exercises.explanationMd: Viết blog buộc bạn structure suy nghĩ → hiểu sâu hơn. Là CV động hơn cert. Recruiter Google bạn → tìm thấy blog → strong signal.

tracks.title: Working Track
tracks.description: Kubernetes deep + EKS + Go advanced (operators, controllers, custom TF provider).

weeks.title: Kubernetes Fundamentals (kind cluster)
weeks.summary: Core K8s objects, kubectl mastery, first Helm chart, local kind cluster.

lessons.title: Pod Lifecycle & Probes
lessons.introMd: Pod states: Pending → Running → Succeeded/Failed. Probes: **liveness** (restart unhealthy), **readiness** (out of service mesh khi chưa ready), **startup** (slow boot apps).

exercises.promptMd: App Go boot mất 60s. Dùng probe nào để pod KHÔNG bị restart trong khi boot?

options.text: startup probe — disable liveness/readiness cho đến khi pass

exercises.explanationMd: Startup probe (K8s 1.16+) thiết kế cho slow-boot. Khi pass, liveness/readiness mới bắt đầu chạy.

exercises.promptMd: Lệnh kubectl xem logs container `app` của pod `web-1` trong namespace `prod`:
exercises.explanationMd: Flag `-c` chọn container nếu pod có nhiều container.

lessons.title: kubectl 30 Commands Drill
lessons.introMd: Speedrun kubectl: get/describe/logs/exec/port-forward/cp/scale/rollout. Mục tiêu: 30 lệnh < 5 phút không tra doc.

exercises.promptMd: Sắp xếp pipeline debug 1 pod CrashLoopBackOff đúng thứ tự:
exercises.explanationMd: Status → events → previous logs → fix. Đừng skip describe.

weeks.title: Kubernetes Networking + Storage
weeks.summary: Gateway API (replacing Ingress), NetworkPolicy default-deny, StatefulSet + PVC.

lessons.title: Gateway API vs Ingress (2026)
lessons.introMd: Ingress (`networking.k8s.io/v1`) đã tới mức stable nhưng vendor-specific annotations. **Gateway API** (CNCF 2026 GA) chuẩn hoá: Gateway + HTTPRoute + TLSRoute, multi-tenant rõ ràng.

exercises.promptMd: Lý do chính 2026 dùng Gateway API thay Ingress là?

options.text: Standardized cross-vendor + role-oriented (cluster ops vs app dev separate)

exercises.explanationMd: Gateway API tách rõ persona: GatewayClass (infra), Gateway (cluster ops), HTTPRoute (app dev). Ingress chỉ 1 layer, mọi setting qua annotation.

weeks.title: Helm Advanced + Kustomize
weeks.summary: Library charts, sub-charts, hooks, Kustomize overlays, hybrid helm template | kustomize.

lessons.title: Helm vs Kustomize — When What
lessons.introMd: **Helm**: package + version + values. Tốt cho third-party + multi-tenant SaaS. **Kustomize**: overlays patch, no templating, native kubectl. Tốt cho cùng app deploy nhiều env.

exercises.promptMd: Deploy cùng product service lên 3 env (dev/stg/prod) chỉ khác replicas + secrets. Recommend?

options.text: Cả 2 đều OK, nhưng Kustomize đơn giản hơn cho same-app-diff-env

exercises.explanationMd: Cùng app, khác env → Kustomize overlays là pattern thuần khiết. Helm shine cho packaging + 3rd-party.

weeks.title: EKS Production Setup (Terraform)
weeks.summary: Cluster module, OIDC, managed addons, IRSA vs EKS Pod Identity.

lessons.title: IRSA vs EKS Pod Identity (2024+)
lessons.introMd: **IRSA**: OIDC provider per cluster; cluster-scoped. **Pod Identity** (2024+): trust via EKS service principal; simpler setup, no OIDC, supports cross-account. AWS recommends Pod Identity cho new clusters.

exercises.promptMd: Workload trong EKS cần assume role ở account B (cross-account). 2026 recommend?

options.text: IRSA — set up OIDC in account A, trust from B
EKS Pod Identity — native cross-account trust via service principal

exercises.explanationMd: Pod Identity simplifies cross-account: trust pods:assumeRole từ EKS service. IRSA cross-account workable nhưng more wiring.

weeks.title: Karpenter + Cost Optimization
weeks.summary: Karpenter v1 NodePool + NodeClass, Spot mix, consolidation, EKS Auto Mode.

lessons.title: Karpenter Consolidation
lessons.introMd: Karpenter `consolidationPolicy: WhenEmptyOrUnderutilized` continuously repacks pods onto fewer/cheaper nodes. Saves 30-50% vs Cluster Autoscaler. Beware PDB cho prod workloads.

exercises.promptMd: Bạn enable Karpenter consolidation, prod service mất 2/3 replicas trong 1 lần consolidation. Vấn đề?

options.text: Thiếu PodDisruptionBudget — Karpenter free to evict all replicas khi repack

exercises.explanationMd: PDB `minAvailable: 1` (hoặc 50%) bắt Karpenter giữ replicas lại trong rolling consolidation. Luôn set PDB cho prod Deployment > 1 replica.

weeks.title: Istio + Observability Stack
weeks.summary: Istio ambient mode (no sidecar), kube-prometheus-stack, Loki, Tempo, SLO with Sloth.

lessons.title: Istio Ambient vs Sidecar
lessons.introMd: **Sidecar mode**: 1 envoy/pod, high resource cost. **Ambient mode** (1.22+ GA): ztunnel (L4) + waypoint (L7 per-namespace). 30-50% less resources, cleaner pod logs.

exercises.promptMd: Cluster 500 pods cần mTLS + traffic policy. 2026 chọn?

options.text: Istio ambient — less resource, ztunnel + waypoint

exercises.explanationMd: Ambient mode đã GA. Cho cluster lớn, save resources đáng kể. Sidecar vẫn fine nhưng overhead 100MB+/pod.

weeks.title: Golang Advanced: HTTP/gRPC Production
weeks.summary: chi/echo, grpc-go, testcontainers, pprof, structured logging slog.

lessons.title: Graceful Shutdown Pattern
lessons.introMd: Production HTTP server PHẢI handle SIGTERM gracefully. Use `signal.NotifyContext(ctx, syscall.SIGTERM, syscall.SIGINT)` → cancel ctx → server.Shutdown(timeoutCtx).

exercises.promptMd: Code shutdown sau có vấn đề gì cho production?

options.text: Thiếu graceful shutdown — SIGTERM kill ngay, drop in-flight requests

exercises.explanationMd: Production cần: `signal.NotifyContext → <-ctx.Done() → srv.Shutdown(timeoutCtx)`. K8s rolling deploy sẽ kill pod thường xuyên.

weeks.title: CRD + controller-runtime + kubebuilder
weeks.summary: First custom resource definition, reconciler loop, owner refs, finalizers.

lessons.title: Reconciler Must Be Idempotent
lessons.introMd: Reconcile được gọi LẶP LẠI cho cùng object (watch events, requeue, periodic). Logic phải idempotent — chạy 2 lần KHÔNG được tạo 2 resources. Use `CreateOrUpdate`, owner refs.

exercises.promptMd: Test reconciler idempotent: run reconcile 2 lần liên tiếp cùng input → expected?

options.text: Không có diff — state ổn định, no-op lần 2

exercises.explanationMd: Idempotent = lần 2 phải no-op. Đó cũng là level-triggered design vs edge-triggered.

weeks.title: Operator Production: Webhooks + Metrics
weeks.summary: Validating + mutating webhooks, leader election cho HA, Prometheus metrics, deploy via Helm.

lessons.title: Why Leader Election for Operators
lessons.introMd: Run 3 operator replicas cho HA, nhưng chỉ 1 leader reconcile. Khác → 3 concurrent reconciles cùng 1 CR = race conditions + duplicate side-effects.

exercises.promptMd: Run 3 operator replicas WITHOUT leader election. Khi 3 cùng reconcile 1 CR tạo external resource — kết quả?
exercises.explanationMd: Operator framework controller-runtime cần `LeaderElection: true`. Khi đó chỉ leader chạy reconcile loop, 2 replicas idle standby.

weeks.title: Custom Terraform Provider (Plugin Framework)
weeks.summary: Terraform plugin-framework v1 (not SDKv2 legacy), Schema → CRUD → ImportState → acceptance tests.

lessons.title: Plugin Framework v1 vs SDKv2 Legacy
lessons.introMd: HashiCorp recommend **plugin-framework** cho providers mới (2024+). Schema kiểu type-safe Go, better diff handling. SDKv2 vẫn maintained nhưng legacy.

exercises.promptMd: Lệnh chạy acceptance tests cho TF provider (cần TF_ACC=1):
exercises.explanationMd: Acceptance tests apply thật lên cloud — tốn $, slow. Chỉ chạy khi `TF_ACC=1` được set.

weeks.title: Multi-tenancy + Quotas + PSS + Kyverno
weeks.summary: Namespace tenancy, ResourceQuota/LimitRange, Pod Security Standards, Kyverno policies cluster-wide.

lessons.title: Kyverno vs OPA Gatekeeper 2026
lessons.introMd: **Kyverno**: YAML policies, K8s-native, easier for ops. **OPA/Gatekeeper**: Rego language, more powerful, used cho Terraform too. 2026: Kyverno popular cho K8s-only; OPA cho multi-target.

exercises.promptMd: Team K8s ops không muốn học Rego. Recommend policy engine?

options.text: Kyverno — YAML policies, no new DSL

exercises.explanationMd: Kyverno = YAML policies (familiar to K8s ops). Falco là runtime detection, không phải admission policy.

weeks.title: CKA Crunch + Capstone
weeks.summary: killer.sh sessions, etcd backup/restore, kubectl --dry-run patterns, exam strategy.

lessons.title: CKA Time Strategy
lessons.introMd: CKA 17 questions, 2 hours. ~7 min/question. Strategy: skip hard ones, do easy first, use `kubectl --dry-run=client -o yaml > x.yaml` aggressively, alias `k=kubectl`.

exercises.promptMd: CKA tip quan trọng nhất để pass time pressure?

options.text: Master `kubectl --dry-run=client -o yaml` + alias k=kubectl + bookmark k8s docs trong exam env

exercises.explanationMd: Exam cho phép tab k8s docs. --dry-run sinh YAML template + alias = save 30s/question = 17 phút total.

tracks.title: Strong Track
tracks.description: DevSecOps + GitOps + supply chain SLSA L3 + compliance scanner Go tool.

weeks.title: Argo CD Foundation + GitOps Mindset
weeks.summary: Declarative, versioned, automated, observable. App-of-Apps, RBAC, sync waves.

lessons.title: Pull-based GitOps vs Push CI/CD
lessons.introMd: **Push CI/CD**: CI server has K8s credentials → kubectl apply. **Pull-based GitOps**: Argo CD inside cluster polls git repo → applies itself. Pull eliminates credential leakage + auto-reconciles drift.

exercises.promptMd: Push CI/CD vs Pull GitOps — vấn đề an ninh chính của push:

options.text: CI/CD server cần long-lived K8s admin credentials (high blast radius nếu compromise)

exercises.explanationMd: Pull (GitOps): Argo CD inside cluster có RBAC scope hẹp, không expose credentials ra ngoài. Push: CI bị compromise = cluster compromise.

weeks.title: Progressive Delivery: Argo Rollouts
weeks.summary: Canary (% traffic split + analysis gates), blue/green, automatic rollback on metric breach.

lessons.title: Metric-Gated Canary
lessons.introMd: AnalysisTemplate query Prometheus mid-rollout: error rate < 0.5%, p99 < 200ms. Khi metric breach → Argo Rollouts AUTO-rollback. Khác hẳn với canary mù (thời gian sleep + manual).

exercises.promptMd: Sau khi config canary 10% → wait 5min → 50%, deploy version có bug → expected?

options.text: Nếu có AnalysisTemplate query error rate → tự rollback < 1min

exercises.explanationMd: AnalysisTemplate là khác biệt: tự đo, tự quyết. Không có nó = chỉ là sleep-based canary.

weeks.title: Supply Chain: SBOM + Sign + Verify (Sigstore)
weeks.summary: Syft cho SBOM, Cosign keyless sign với OIDC, Kyverno verifyImages chặn unsigned ở admission. SLSA L3.

lessons.title: Cosign Keyless Signing (no private key)
lessons.introMd: Keyless: GH Action OIDC token → Fulcio CA → short-lived x509 cert → sign image → store sig in Rekor transparency log. Không có key để leak. Verify pin identity (GH org/repo).

exercises.promptMd: Ưu điểm chính của Cosign keyless vs traditional gpg signing?

options.text: Không có private key để leak/mất; identity bound to OIDC issuer (GH/Google); transparency log Rekor

exercises.explanationMd: Keyless = ephemeral cert + transparency log. Identity verify dựa trên `subject` claim trong cert (vd: repo:ORG/REPO).

weeks.title: Vault + External Secrets Operator
weeks.summary: Vault HA + auto-unseal KMS, K8s auth, dynamic RDS creds, ESO sync secrets vào K8s.

lessons.title: Dynamic vs Static Secrets
lessons.introMd: **Static**: 1 password sống mãi → khi leak phải rotate tay. **Dynamic**: Vault tạo username/password mới mỗi request, TTL 1h. Compromise = revoke 1 lease, không ảnh hưởng cái khác.

exercises.promptMd: DB credentials leak vào logs. Setup nào giảm blast radius nhất?
exercises.explanationMd: Dynamic creds TTL ngắn = leak chỉ valid ≤ 1h. Static = forever valid until manual rotate.

weeks.title: Policy as Code: OPA/Conftest + Kyverno
weeks.summary: Rego cho Terraform gating, Kyverno cluster policies (baseline + restricted PSS).

lessons.title: Conftest Gating Terraform PRs
lessons.introMd: Pipeline: `terraform plan -out=tfplan && terraform show -json tfplan > plan.json && conftest test plan.json --policy=./policies`. Block PR khi policy fail (vd: S3 unencrypted, SG 0.0.0.0/0 unusual port).

exercises.promptMd: Conftest policy nào tốt nhất chặn drift TF?

options.text: Require all S3 buckets encrypted with KMS + block port 22 from 0.0.0.0/0 + require tags CostCenter/Owner

exercises.explanationMd: Baseline security rules + cost tagging. Conftest có unit tests trong Rego → test policies trước khi apply.

weeks.title: Runtime Security: Falco + Audit Logs
weeks.summary: Falco eBPF rules cho container runtime, K8s audit logs, forward SIEM.

lessons.title: Falco (runtime) vs Kyverno (admission)
lessons.introMd: **Admission** (Kyverno): block trước khi pod start. **Runtime** (Falco): detect AFTER pod start, ví dụ malicious exec, file mod, network connection. Cần CẢ HAI.

exercises.promptMd: Attacker compromise app, run `nc -lvp 4444` trong pod. Phòng vệ nào DETECT?

options.text: Falco runtime rule 'unexpected listening port' → alert SIEM

exercises.explanationMd: Kyverno block ở admission (image, securityContext). Sau khi pod chạy = ngoài tầm Kyverno. Falco eBPF nhìn syscall → catch.

weeks.title: Go Compliance Scanner (Tool #4)
weeks.summary: Build shopscan Go tool: scan AWS (CIS), K8s (CIS), GitHub repos, output SARIF.

lessons.title: SARIF — Standard Findings Format
lessons.introMd: SARIF (Static Analysis Results Interchange Format) = JSON schema cho findings. GitHub Code Scanning, GitLab, defectdojo đều import. Output từ scanner → upload → unified UI.

exercises.promptMd: GH Action step upload SARIF cho Code Scanning:
exercises.explanationMd: `uses: github/codeql-action/upload-sarif@v3` upload file SARIF → GH Security tab.

weeks.title: Advanced GH Actions + DORA Metrics
weeks.summary: Reusable workflows, composite actions, self-hosted runners on EKS via ARC, DORA collector Go service.

lessons.title: DORA 4 Keys
lessons.introMd: DORA (DevOps Research and Assessment) 4 metrics định nghĩa elite engineering: **Deployment Frequency**, **Lead Time for Changes**, **Change Failure Rate**, **MTTR** (Time to Restore Service).

exercises.promptMd: Đâu là 4 DORA keys? (chọn 4)
exercises.explanationMd: Elite teams (per DORA 2024): deploy multiple/day, lead time < 1 day, CFR < 15%, MTTR < 1h.

weeks.title: Disaster Recovery + Backup (Velero)
weeks.summary: Velero backup K8s namespaces + PVs, AWS Backup centralized cross-region, restore drills.

lessons.title: RTO vs RPO — Don't Confuse
lessons.introMd: **RTO** = Recovery Time Objective: how fast back online. **RPO** = Recovery Point Objective: how much data loss tolerable. Mỗi tier cần khác: tier-1 RTO < 5min RPO < 1min vs tier-3 RTO 24h RPO 24h.

exercises.promptMd: App tài chính: RTO 5 phút, RPO 0. Recommend?

options.text: Multi-AZ DB với sync replica + active-active app

exercises.explanationMd: RPO 0 = no data loss = sync replica BẮT BUỘC. RTO 5min = active-active hoặc auto-failover < 5min.

weeks.title: Cost Optimization (Pre-FinOps) + DevOps Pro Prep
weeks.summary: OpenCost dashboard per namespace, CUR + Athena queries, Savings Plans strategy, exam prep.

lessons.title: Savings Plans vs Reserved Instances
lessons.introMd: **RIs** instance-specific: m5.xlarge ap-southeast-1 — không flex. **Savings Plans Compute**: 1y/3y commit, ANY instance family/region/OS. Flex >>> RI cho production thay đổi. SP Compute thường = pick 2026.

exercises.promptMd: Production fleet 80% EC2, occasional Fargate/Lambda, có thể đổi instance type theo workload. Recommend?

options.text: Compute Savings Plans (1Y commit, applies EC2+Fargate+Lambda)

exercises.explanationMd: SP Compute apply across compute services + family flex. Discount tương đương Standard RI nhưng linh hoạt hơn.

weeks.title: CKS Prep + Hardening
weeks.summary: Certified Kubernetes Security Specialist exam topics; kube-bench + prowler + kube-hunter scans.

lessons.title: CKS Key Tools
lessons.introMd: CKS exam tools: **kube-bench** (CIS K8s benchmark), **trivy** (image scan), **falco** (runtime), **opa/gatekeeper** (admission). Tất cả ở /usr/local/bin trong exam env.

exercises.promptMd: Lệnh trivy scan image `nginx:latest` for HIGH+CRITICAL vulnerabilities:
exercises.explanationMd: `trivy image --severity HIGH,CRITICAL nginx:latest` — exit code 1 nếu tìm thấy → useful trong CI gate.

weeks.title: AWS DevOps Pro + Phase 3 Capstone
weeks.summary: AWS Certified DevOps Engineer Professional (DOP-C02) prep, Phase 3 retro + capstone blog.

lessons.title: DOP-C02 Six Domains
lessons.introMd: DOP-C02 (2023+ version): SDLC Automation, Config/IaC, Resilient Cloud Solutions, Monitoring/Logging, Incident/Event Response, Security/Compliance. Weights ~16-22% each.

exercises.promptMd: DOP-C02 đặc trưng nhất so với SAA-C03 là?

options.text: Scenarios end-to-end: cho 1 pipeline broken → debug → fix dùng CodePipeline/CodeBuild/CodeDeploy + Systems Manager + EventBridge

exercises.explanationMd: DOP-C02 thiên về workflow scenarios, không học thuộc service. Cần hands-on với CodeBuild/CodeDeploy/CodePipeline.

tracks.title: Expert Track
tracks.description: Platform Engineering + Multi-region + IDP with Backstage + Crossplane + Go production services.

weeks.title: Platform Engineering + Backstage Install
weeks.summary: Backstage Software Catalog as the IDP frontend, TechDocs, plugin model, GitHub OAuth.

lessons.title: Backstage vs Port vs Cortex
lessons.introMd: **Backstage**: open-source CNCF, self-host, plugin-heavy, dev work needed. **Port**/Cortex: SaaS, faster start, less custom. For 50+ eng org, Backstage wins long-term (control + plugins).

exercises.promptMd: Org 50 engineers, 200 services, muốn IDP để self-service infra. Recommend?

options.text: Backstage self-hosted + Crossplane abstractions + scaffolder templates

exercises.explanationMd: Backstage = catalog + TechDocs + scaffolder. Crossplane = K8s-native cloud abstraction. Combo dominant trong 2026 platform engineering.

weeks.title: Backstage Software Templates + Scaffolder
weeks.summary: Scaffolder template form → generate repo + CI + chart + dashboard. Self-service developer experience.

lessons.title: Scaffolder Built-in Actions
lessons.introMd: Scaffolder ships actions: `fetch:template` (cookiecutter), `publish:github` (create repo), `catalog:register`, `github:actions:secret`. Chain qua YAML steps trong template.yaml.

exercises.promptMd: Scaffolder template 'New Go Service' chạy đúng thứ tự bước nào?

steps.text: publish:github — create new repo from rendered files
catalog:register — add Component to Backstage Catalog

exercises.explanationMd: Form → render → publish → register. Optional thêm: secrets, ArgoCD app create.

weeks.title: Crossplane v2 + Compositions
weeks.summary: Crossplane = K8s-native cloud abstraction. XRD = API contract; Composition = implementation; Composition Functions cho dynamic logic.

lessons.title: Crossplane vs Terraform — Cùng tồn tại
lessons.introMd: **Terraform**: bootstrap foundation (VPC, EKS, IAM org). **Crossplane**: app-level on-demand provisioning. Dev claim `kind: PostgresInstance` → Crossplane composer giải bằng RDS + secret. Vẫn dùng cả 2.

exercises.promptMd: Dev cần Postgres DB cho microservice mới. 2026 best DX?

options.text: Apply manifest `kind: PostgresInstance` claim → Crossplane Composition tự tạo RDS + secret, < 5min

exercises.explanationMd: Crossplane self-service = developer velocity. Platform team viết Composition 1 lần, dev claim N lần.

weeks.title: Multi-Region Architecture Design
weeks.summary: Active-active vs active-passive trade-offs, Aurora Global, DynamoDB Global, Route 53 routing.

lessons.title: Active-Active Trade-offs
lessons.introMd: Active-active: 100% uptime cho regional failure, nhưng 1.5-2x cost, write conflicts (last-write-wins / app-level resolution), DNS routing complexity.

exercises.promptMd: Active-active 2 regions có write conflicts. Strategy nào BẮT BUỘC quyết trước build?

options.text: Last-write-wins (timestamp-based) hoặc app-level CRDTs / vector clocks

exercises.explanationMd: Conflict resolution là design decision, không phải tactical. Aurora Global = single-writer; DynamoDB Global = LWW; cell-based active-active app-level.

weeks.title: Multi-Region Deployment + Failover Drill
weeks.summary: Deploy 2 regions từ TF, Argo CD multi-cluster ApplicationSet, Route 53 failover, drill.

lessons.title: Drill > Backup Count
lessons.introMd: Backup count không cứu bạn. Untested restore = no restore. Schedule failover drill quarterly: actual flip traffic, time it, capture learnings, update runbook.

exercises.promptMd: DR maturity: which signals top-quartile org?

options.text: Quarterly game day với actual failover, measured RTO, written retro

exercises.explanationMd: Practice the failover until boring. Untested = won't work in real incident.

weeks.title: Chaos Engineering: Chaos Mesh + AWS FIS
weeks.summary: Hypothesis-driven experiments, blast radius control, first team game day.

lessons.title: Chaos Engineering Hypothesis Format
lessons.introMd: 1 chaos experiment = Hypothesis + Fault + Steady-state metric + Blast radius + Abort condition. KHÔNG được 'random kill stuff' — phải có expected outcome.

exercises.promptMd: Đâu là chaos experiment chính xác?

options.text: Kill all pods, see what happens
Hypothesis: killing 30% pods of product service should NOT breach SLO 99.9%. Fault: pod-kill 30%. Steady-state: SLO trên Grafana. Blast: only dev. Abort: error rate > 5%.

exercises.explanationMd: Hypothesis-driven + controlled blast radius + clear abort = chaos engineering. Không có structure = vandalism.

weeks.title: Go Production: cost-optimizer service (Tool #5)
weeks.summary: Ingest CUR via Athena, store Postgres, anomaly detection (z-score), Backstage plugin dashboard.

lessons.title: Z-Score Anomaly Detection
lessons.introMd: Simple anomaly: compute mean + stddev of last 30 days cost per service. Today > mean + 3·stddev = anomaly. Cheap, no ML needed.

exercises.promptMd: AWS service X bình thường $100/ngày, stddev $10. Hôm nay $200. Anomaly?
exercises.explanationMd: Z = (200 - 100) / 10 = 10. Common threshold z > 3 đã alert. Z = 10 = chắc chắn cần investigate.

weeks.title: Go Production: deployment-manager (Tool #6)
weeks.summary: Slack /deploy command → PR to gitops repo → 2 approvers → merge → Argo CD sync → status back to Slack.

lessons.title: Deploy State Machine
lessons.introMd: State: requested → validated → approval-pending → merged → syncing → success/failed. Each transition logged immutable in DB. Slack notifications per transition.

exercises.promptMd: Deploy được approve nhưng merge bị fail (CI red). State machine xử lý sao?

options.text: Transition 'merge_failed' với reason; allow retry hoặc cancel; emit Slack notif

exercises.explanationMd: State machine phải handle mọi failure mode explicitly. Don't bypass CI tự động — đó là incident pattern.

weeks.title: platform-api (Tool #7) + OpenFeature
weeks.summary: Aggregate Backstage + cost-optimizer + deployment-manager + compliance-scanner under 1 facade. OpenFeature SDK cho feature flags.

lessons.title: OpenFeature vs Custom Flags
lessons.introMd: OpenFeature là CNCF spec cho feature flags — provider-agnostic. Today bạn dùng flagd; mai chuyển sang LaunchDarkly mà KHÔNG đổi app code. Standard interface.

exercises.promptMd: Vì sao OpenFeature tốt hơn custom feature flag client?

options.text: Vendor lock-in avoidance — swap provider sau này không đổi app code; community telemetry hooks; cross-language consistency

exercises.explanationMd: OpenFeature standardize interface (`client.getBooleanValue(...)`). Provider swappable: flagd OSS → LaunchDarkly SaaS không cần refactor.

weeks.title: FinOps Automation: Anomaly + Right-size
weeks.summary: Off-hours stop (dev env 22-7), unused EBS/EIP cleaner, weekly right-size PR, exec dashboard.

lessons.title: Off-Hours Stop ROI
lessons.introMd: Dev env 24/7 = wasted $$$. Stop weeknight 22-7 + weekend = 65 hour active vs 168 = 39% utilization → 61% saving. Easy automation = highest ROI FinOps action.

exercises.promptMd: Dev env tốn $5k/month, on 24/7. Stop weeknight 22-7 + weekend. Approx savings?
exercises.explanationMd: 168 - 65 = 103 inactive hours = 61%. Tiết kiệm $5k * 0.61 ≈ $3k. EC2/RDS/ECS stop được; S3/DynamoDB không cần.

weeks.title: Career Polish: Resume + ADRs + Mock Interview
weeks.summary: 1-page resume project-led, LinkedIn rebrand, 5 ADRs, mock interviews Pramp/interviewing.io.

lessons.title: Quantify Everything on Resume
lessons.introMd: Bad: 'Worked on AWS infrastructure.' Good: 'Reduced AWS spend 35% (~$50k/yr) by building Go cost-optimizer tool; right-sized 200+ EC2 + automated dev off-hours.'

exercises.promptMd: Resume bullet nào TỐT nhất cho Senior DevOps?

options.text: Built EKS multi-region active-active platform serving 50M req/day at p99 < 200ms; reduced deploy time 4h → 8min via GitOps + Argo Rollouts

exercises.explanationMd: Specific scale numbers + concrete improvement + tech context = senior signal. Generic verbs = junior signal.

weeks.title: Final Capstone + Job Applications
weeks.summary: 15-min Loom demo end-to-end, year-end blog 3000+ words, 5+ applications, 1 OSS PR.

lessons.title: 15-min Capstone Demo Script
lessons.introMd: Recipe: 0-2min intro + journey, 2-5min architecture tour, 5-9min self-service demo (Backstage scaffold), 9-12min pipeline demo (canary), 12-15min Q&A close. Practice 3x.

exercises.promptMd: Capstone demo recipe nào hiệu quả nhất với recruiter/hiring manager?

options.text: 15 phút Loom: intro → architecture → live self-service → pipeline → chaos drill → close. Practice 3x.

exercises.explanationMd: Hiring managers watch 2-3 min then decide. Strong opening + visual + outcomes-focused. Practice removes ums, dead-air.
